description: .NET version upgrade plan from .NET 8.0 to .NET 10.0 LTS

tasks.reason: The user has explicitly requested an upgrade to the latest LTS version. .NET 10.0 is the current latest Long-Term Support release, offering improved performance, new language features, enhanced security, and longer support lifecycle compared to .NET 8.0.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade all 10 projects in the eShopOnWeb solution from net8.0 to net10.0. This includes updating the TargetFramework in Directory.Packages.props, updating the SDK version in global.json from 8.0.x to 10.0.x, upgrading all NuGet package references (Microsoft.AspNetCore.*, Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.*, and related packages) to their .NET 10 compatible versions, resolving any breaking API changes between .NET 8 and .NET 10 across the Web, PublicApi, ApplicationCore, Infrastructure, BlazorShared, BlazorAdmin projects, and ensuring all unit, functional, and integration tests pass after the upgrade.
